points.text: Erasca (ERAS) — ERAS-0015 — Pan-RAS molecular glue — Securities class action alleges company misled investors by claiming 'best-in-class' status while concealing patent infringement risks from Revolution Medicines and downplaying safety risks including a patient death.

Erasca Inc. — ERAS-0015 — Pan-RAS molecular glue — Securities class action alleges company misled investors on safety and IP moat; patient death reported in trial; stock declined >$2.8B market cap following April 2026 disclosures.

Erasca Inc. — ERAS-0015 — RAS-mutant solid tumors — Pan-RAS molecular glue under development; stock fell 48% ($9.25) following RevMed patent infringement allegations and a patient death one month post-treatment.
Erasca — ERAS-0015 — KRAS-mutant solid tumors — Updated preliminary Phase 1 data released for pan-RAS molecular glue; registration-enabling plans initiated.
Erasca — ERAS-0015 — KRAS-mutant solid tumors — Closed upsized public offering of 36,142,857 shares at $17.50/share, raising gross proceeds of $632.5M to fund molecular glue development.

Erasca — ERAS-0015 — Pan-RAS molecular glue — Class action complaint alleges false claims of superiority over Revolution Medicines' RMC-6236; disclosures on April 27–28, 2026 revealed patent infringement allegations and a patient death linked to clinical trials, triggering a stock decline wiping out $2.8B market cap.

Erasca Inc. — ERAS-0015 — Pan-RAS molecular glue — Patent infringement and trade secret misappropriation claims filed by Revolution Medicines; preliminary trial data includes patient death; Hagens Berman investigating securities fraud allegations.

Erasca Inc. — ERAS-0015 — RAS-mutant solid tumors — Revolution Medicines accused Erasca of patent infringement regarding the pan-RAS molecular glue; Erasca disclosed a patient death one month after receiving the investigational therapy.
Erasca — ERAS-0015 — KRAS-mutant solid tumors — Phase 1 data update released; program identified as potentially best-in-class pan-RAS molecular glue; registration-enabling studies planned.

Erasca — Pan-RAS molecular glue development — ERAS-0015 — Facing securities class action (Jan 14, 2025–Apr 26, 2026) alleging misrepresentation of competitive advantage, IP security, and safety profile; lead plaintiff deadline set for August 10, 2026.

Erasca Inc. — Pan-RAS molecular glue development — ERAS-0015 — Facing securities class action (Jan 2025–Apr 2026) over alleged misrepresentation of safety, IP, and competitive advantage vs Revolution Medicines' RMC-6236; stock lost >$2.8B market cap.

Erasca Inc. — Pan-RAS molecular glue development — ERAS-0015 — Facing securities class action amid $2.8B market cap loss; allegations include improper dose comparisons to RevMed's RMC-6236 and undisclosed IP disputes.
Erasca — Pan-RAS molecular glue development — ERAS-0015 — Phase 1 clinical stage; secured $632.5M capital raise in July 2026 to advance registration-enabling plans.

ERAS-0015 — Mechanism: Pan-RAS molecular glue — Phase: Clinical trials (specific phase not stated in article) — Population: Oncology patients — Results: Preliminary data included a patient death; complaint alleges company downplayed safety risks and used flawed preclinical comparisons against Revolution Medicines' RMC-6236.

ERAS-0015 — Mechanism: Pan-RAS molecular glue — Phase: Clinical trial (unspecified phase in source) — Population: Oncology patients — Comparator: Revolution Medicines' RMC-6236 (alleged superiority claim) — Results: Patient death reported; adverse safety data triggered stock decline.

ERAS-0015 — Mechanism: Pan-RAS molecular glue — Phase: Investigational — Population: RAS-mutant solid tumors (including pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma) — Comparator: RevMed's RMC-6236 (alleged improper 40mg vs 400mg comparison) — Safety: One patient death reported one month post-treatment.
ERAS-0015 — Mechanism: Pan-RAS molecular glue — Phase: 1 — Population: KRAS-mutant solid tumors — Status: Preliminary data released; registration-enabling studies initiated.

Erasca — Patent litigation and securities fraud — ERAS-0015 — Alleged concealment of patent infringement and trade secret misappropriation claims from Revolution Medicines; disclosures triggered $2.8B market cap loss.

Erasca Inc. — Securities litigation — ERAS-0015 — Hagens Berman Sobol Shapiro LLP investigating class action for investors; lead plaintiff deadline Aug 10, 2026; allegations include concealed patent disputes with Revolution Medicines and undisclosed patient safety risks.

Erasca Inc. — Intellectual property dispute — ERAS-0015 — Revolution Medicines issued legal challenge alleging trade secret misappropriation and invalid IP claims; Erasca previously in-licensed one patent family from Joyo.
Erasca — Equity financing — ERAS-0015 molecular glue program — Closed upsized public offering of 36,142,857 shares at $17.50/share; gross proceeds $632.5M; funds allocated to R&D and working capital.
